title: No Natural Regeneration
body:
# No Natural Regeneration

This datapack automatically disables the natural health regeneration mechanic in Minecraft by setting the gamerule **natural_health_regeneration** to false when the world loads.

With this change, players will no longer regenerate health by consuming food. Hunger can still be restored, but it will not restore health over time. This increases the overall difficulty and encourages alternative healing methods such as potions, golden apples, or other custom mechanics.

The datapack runs on world load and requires no manual configuration.

## Features:

- Automatically sets naturalRegeneration to false
- Prevents health regeneration from food
- Compatible with existing worlds (after a /reload)
- No performance impact

## Installation:
Place the datapack in the world’s datapacks folder and reload or restart the world.
